mapper.select:
select s2.sys_id as outSysId, s2.SYS_SOURCE as outOobjSource from STANDARDIZE_OUTPUTOBJECT s1 inner join STANDARDIZE_OBJECT s2 on s1.OBJ_GUID = s2.obj_guid
s1.OOBJ_STATUS = 1
and upper(obj_engname) = upper(#{tableId})
select f1.oobj_guid from STANDARDIZE_OUTPUTOBJECT f1 inner join STANDARDIZE_OBJECT f2 on f1.obj_guid = f2.obj_guid where UPPER(f2.OBJ_ENGNAME) = UPPER(#{tableId}) and rownum = 1

select f2.OBJ_GUID from STANDARDIZE_OUTPUTOBJECT f1 inner join STANDARDIZE_OBJECT f2 ON f1.OBJ_GUID = f2.OBJ_GUID WHERE upper(f2.OBJ_ENGNAME) = upper(#{tableId}) and f2.SYS_ID = #{sysId} and f2.SYS_SOURCE = #{ownerFactoryNum} and rownum = 1
select oobj_guid from STANDARDIZE_OUTPUTOBJECT F1 inner join STANDARDIZE_OBJECT F2 ON F1.OBJ_GUID = F2.OBJ_GUID WHERE upper(F2.OBJ_ENGNAME) = upper(#{tableId}) and rownum = 1

select f6.sys_id as outSysId , f6.SYS_SOURCE as outOobjSource, obj_engname as outObjEngName from STANDARDIZE_OUTPUTOBJECT f5 inner join STANDARDIZE_OBJECT f6 on f5.OBJ_GUID = f6.obj_guid where f5.OOBJ_STATUS = 1
